## Our Company
Founded in 2019, we recognized quantum technology's potential to revolutionize AI and optimization solutions. This vision gave rise to Singularity, our advanced platform, created to empower clients. Guided by a customer-centric philosophy, we collaborate to tailor models for specific challenges, aiming to seamlessly integrate user-friendly, disruptive software into the industry landscape.
[Meet the team](https://multiversecomputing.com/our-team)
![Profile picture of Román Orús](https://multiversecomputing.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fls8k7ser%2Fproduction%2Fed310a90c50201638e4e3865a1aa9699ac9f8255-1040x934.png%3Ffit%3Dmax%26auto%3Dformat&w=3840&q=75)

### Román Orús
#### CSO
Quantum physicist. PhD. Ikerbasque Research Professor at DIPC. Visiting professor at the BSC. Johannes Guttenberg Universität Mainz, University of Queensland, Max Planck Institute, CNRS, Marie Curie IIF, Early Career Prize from the European Physical Society. Author of numerous highly-cited papers on quantum physics and computation. Steering Board of Quantum Journal. Partner of Entanglement Partners. Ex-President of GEIC in the RSEF.
#### R&D Initiatives
## Proyecto RETECH
Multiverse Computing has participated in the development of the Q-AINA project, which focuses on the efficient compression and execution of artificial intelligence models using quantum and quantum-inspired techniques. Its contribution has involved the application of machine learning models for the characterization and control of quantum systems, as well as the validation of hybrid solutions that combine classical and quantum computing. This project was developed under the RETECH Program – Line 1: Projects to Promote Technology Transfer and Innovation in the Field of AI, administered by the Department of Business and Labor of the Government of Catalonia. With the support of the Government of Catalonia.
![EU](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/development/57025482ce05c753b957416bfde367353de8abfe-1687x400.png)
## Proyecto ONTZHI
Multiverse Computing has drawn on its expertise in advanced modeling and the analysis of complex systems to address the challenges associated with hydrogen storage and transportation. Its work has focused on developing tools that enhance our understanding and optimization of the processes involved in this field.
![EJ-GV](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/91a123e6565b6f7067bd985c292fbc7c98a5d2bd-491x200.png)
## Proyecto OPTIVIA
Multiverse Computing has focused its efforts on applying artificial intelligence and advanced optimization techniques to the aviation sector, with the aim of improving flight operational efficiency. The company has played a key role in developing models capable of analyzing large volumes of data and generating optimized solutions in complex environments.
![EJ-GV](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/91a123e6565b6f7067bd985c292fbc7c98a5d2bd-491x200.png)
## Proyecto GRECO
Multiverse Computing has played a key role in developing advanced artificial intelligence solutions designed to improve computational efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of digital systems. Its work has focused on researching and applying innovative techniques that optimize AI models, reducing their resource consumption without compromising performance.
![EJ-GV](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/91a123e6565b6f7067bd985c292fbc7c98a5d2bd-491x200.png)
## Gipuzkoa Advanced New Therapies Territory (GANTT)
Multiverse Computing Research has played a key role in the development and execution of the project funded under the \"Gipuzkoa Advanced New Therapies Territory (GANTT)\" program, contributing significantly to its objectives through its leadership in advanced quantum computing technologies applied to the biotechnology sector. Our participation has ensured an innovative approach that not only strengthens the competitiveness of the technological ecosystem in Gipuzkoa, but also generates a direct impact on the advancement of advanced therapies.
![Gipuzkoako Foru Aldundia Logo](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/cf8d1941826099b8d2fa3846892a20f7d64fa039-88x24.svg)
## HORMIGOBOTS
Research and development of solutions based on biomimetics for the generation of flexible production environments adapted to the manufacture of short series with uncertain volumes of electric, plug-in hybrid and hydrogen-powered vehicles, financed by the Center for the Development of Industrial Technology (CDTI) within the Sustainable Automotive Technology Program (PTAS).
![Gobierno de España Logo](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/development/8ce6a604e013a96209b15da1b6ea10dae49112e3-1349x400.png)![CDTI Logo](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/development/5904b28afac94ea73b1c35f0753c451386a41699-880x400.png)![Financiado por la Union Europea Logo](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/development/57025482ce05c753b957416bfde367353de8abfe-1687x400.png)

## This company is invested in by Sociedad Española para la Transformación Tecnológica, E.P.E. (SETT)
Multiverse Computing is backed by the Sociedad Española para la Transformación Tecnológica, E.P.E. (SETT), a Spanish public entity that promotes technological innovation. SETT’s investment reflects strong institutional support for Multiverse’s mission to advance cutting-edge computing and AI across strategic industries.

.2s,transform .2s}.sonner-loader[data-visible=false]{opacity:0;transform:scale(.8) translate(-50%,-50%)}</style><style type="text/css">.rfm-marquee-container {
  overflow-x: hidden;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  position: relative;
  width: var(--width);
  transform: var(--transform);
}
.rfm-marquee-container:hover div {
  animation-play-state: var(--pause-on-hover);
}
.rfm-marquee-container:active div {
  animation-play-state: var(--pause-on-click);
}

.rfm-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}
.rfm-overlay::before, .rfm-overlay::after {
  background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--gradient-color), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0));
  content: "";
  height: 100%;
  position: absolute;
  width: var(--gradient-width);
  z-index: 2;
  pointer-events: none;
  touch-action: none;
}
.rfm-overlay::after {
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  transform: rotateZ(180deg);
}
.rfm-overlay::before {
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
}

.rfm-marquee {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-width: var(--min-width);
  z-index: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  animation: scroll var(--duration) linear var(--delay) var(--iteration-count);
  animation-play-state: var(--play);
  animation-delay: var(--delay);
  animation-direction: var(--direction);
}
@keyframes scroll {
  0% {
    transform: translateX(0%);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateX(-100%);
  }
}

.rfm-initial-child-container {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  min-width: auto;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
}

.rfm-child {
  transform: var(--transform);
}</style></head><body class="max-w-full overflow-x-hidden overscroll-y-none font-satoshi"><main class="grid min-h-[100svh] grid-cols-1 grid-rows-[1fr_auto] bg-gray-14 font-satoshi font-normal class="flex flex-col h-full gap-12 p-5 rounded-3xl bg-gray-11 md:p-12"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-5"><h2 class="text-lg md:text-xl font-medium md:font-bold text-gray-1">Proyecto RETECH</h2><p class="text-base font-normal md:font-medium text-gray-6">Multiverse Computing has participated in the development of the Q-AINA project, which focuses on the efficient compression and execution of artificial intelligence models using quantum and quantum-inspired techniques. Its contribution has involved the application of machine learning models for the characterization and control of quantum systems, as well as the validation of hybrid solutions that combine classical and quantum computing. 

This project was developed under the RETECH Program – Line 1: Projects to Promote Technology Transfer and Innovation in the Field of AI, administered by the Department of Business and Labor of the Government of Catalonia.
With the support of the Government of Catalonia.</p></div><div class="relative flex items-center gap-6 mt-auto flex-wrap"><img src="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/development/57025482ce05c753b957416bfde367353de8abfe-1687x400.png" class="h-6 w-auto" alt="EU" width="1687" height="400"></div></div></div><div class="h-full min-h-full min-w-0 flex-[0_0_100%] flex-grow pl-5 md:flex-[0_0_calc(50%-1rem)] md:pl-0"><div class="flex flex-col h-full gap-12 p-5 rounded-3xl bg-gray-11 md:p-12"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-5"><h2 class="text-lg md:text-xl font-medium md:font-bold text-gray-1">Proyecto ONTZHI</h2><p class="text-base font-normal md:font-medium text-gray-6">Multiverse Computing has drawn on its expertise in advanced modeling and the analysis of complex systems to address the challenges associated with hydrogen storage and transportation. Its work has focused on developing tools that enhance our understanding and optimization of the processes involved in this field.</p></div><div class="relative flex items-center gap-6 mt-auto flex-wrap"><img src="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/91a123e6565b6f7067bd985c292fbc7c98a5d2bd-491x200.png" class="h-6 w-auto" alt="EJ-GV"></div></div></div><div class="h-full min-h-full min-w-0 flex-[0_0_100%] flex-grow pl-5 md:flex-[0_0_calc(50%-1rem)] md:pl-0"><div class="flex flex-col h-full gap-12 p-5 rounded-3xl bg-gray-11 md:p-12"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-5"><h2 class="text-lg md:text-xl font-medium md:font-bold text-gray-1">Proyecto OPTIVIA</h2><p class="text-base font-normal md:font-medium text-gray-6">Multiverse Computing has focused its efforts on applying artificial intelligence and advanced optimization techniques to the aviation sector, with the aim of improving flight operational efficiency. The company has played a key role in developing models capable of analyzing large volumes of data and generating optimized solutions in complex environments.</p></div><div class="relative flex items-center gap-6 mt-auto flex-wrap"><img src="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/91a123e6565b6f7067bd985c292fbc7c98a5d2bd-491x200.png" class="h-6 w-auto" alt="EJ-GV"></div></div></div><div class="h-full min-h-full min-w-0 flex-[0_0_100%] flex-grow pl-5 md:flex-[0_0_calc(50%-1rem)] md:pl-0"><div class="flex flex-col h-full gap-12 p-5 rounded-3xl bg-gray-11 md:p-12"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-5"><h2 class="text-lg md:text-xl font-medium md:font-bold text-gray-1">Proyecto GRECO</h2><p class="text-base font-normal md:font-medium text-gray-6">Multiverse Computing has played a key role in developing advanced artificial intelligence solutions designed to improve computational efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of digital systems. Its work has focused on researching and applying innovative techniques that optimize AI models, reducing their resource consumption without compromising performance.</p></div><div class="relative flex items-center gap-6 mt-auto flex-wrap"><img src="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ls8k7ser/production/91a123e6565b6f7067bd985c292fbc7c98a5d2bd-491x200.png" class="h-6 w-auto" alt="EJ-GV"></div></div></div><div class="h-full min-h-full min-w-0 flex-[0_0_100%] flex-grow pl-5 md:flex-[0_0_calc(50%-1rem)] md:pl-0"><div class="flex flex-col h-full gap-12 p-5 rounded-3xl bg-gray-11 md:p-12"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-5"><h2 class="text-lg md:text-xl font-medium md:font-bold text-gray-1">Gipuzkoa Advanced New Therapies Territory (GANTT)</h2><p class="text-base font-normal md:font-medium text-gray-6">Multiverse Computing Research has played a key role in the development and execution of the project funded under the \"Gipuzkoa Advanced New Therapies Territory (GANTT)\" program, contributing significantly to its objectives through its leadership in advanced quantum computing technologies applied to the biotechnology sector. Our participation has ensured an innovative approach that not only strengthens the competitiveness of the technological ecosystem in Gipuzkoa, but also generates a direct impact on the advancement of advanced therapies.</p></div><div class="relative flex items-center gap-6 mt-auto flex-wrap"><img
